narrative.headline: 2018 Volkswagen Passat: brakes and engine top owner complaints
narrative.summary: Across 45 owner complaints to NHTSA, service brakes lead at 12 reports (27%), followed by the engine at 11 (24%) and the electrical system at 10 (22%). No fires were reported in any category. The brake and engine reports each include 1 injury, and a few involved a crash.

issues.sample: I BOUGHT THIS VEHICLE ON JUNE 8, 2018, FROM HERITAGE VW. THE CAR ALREADY HAD A SAFETY RECALL FOR BRAKES WHICH WAS ISSUED ON MAY 25, 2018. THE DEALER FAILED TO INFORM ME ABOUT IT BEFORE PURCHASE.     LATER AFTER MY PURCHASE ON JUNE 22 A DO NOT DRIVE WAS ISSUED ON THIS VEHICLE, THE
issues.title: Service Brakes
issues.blurb: Most-reported area: 12 complaints (27%), with 2 crashes and 1 injury. Some owners describe a brake safety recall on the car, including a do-not-drive notice.

issues.sample: MY FATHER WAS HEADING HOME WHEN HE STOPPED THE HILL DOWN FROM HIS HOUSE. UPON TRYING TO ACCELERATE HE NOTICED THE VEHICLE DID NOT WANT TO GO. THE ENGINE HAD STALLED/HESITATED. HE PRESSED THE GAS A FEW TIMES AND NOTHING HAPPENED, THE RPM HA D WAS THE ONLY THING MOVING. THEN, ALL O
issues.title: Engine
issues.blurb: Second most-reported: 11 complaints (24%), with 1 crash and 1 injury. Owners describe the engine stalling or hesitating, with the car not accelerating when needed.

issues.sample: I HAD REPORTED THE ISSUE TO VW VERBALLY AND SERVICE DEPARTMENT BASICALLY ADVISED I WILL HAVE TO PLACE IT ON THE MACHINE TO RUN A DIAGNOSTIC TEST THAT IS NOT COVERED. I DID NOT HAVE THE FUNDS BUT THEY SAID IF IT HAPPENED AGAIN LET THEM KNOW. IT DID SEVERAL OCCASIONS AFTER THAT ALL
issues.title: Electrical System
issues.blurb: 10 complaints (22%), including 1 crash. Owners report recurring electrical problems and difficulty getting them diagnosed.

issues.sample: First/only owner of a 2018 VW Passat GP r-line, scheduled maintenance intervals followed religiously and performed by VW; only filled with top tier fuel (mid/premium), no prev. indicator lights ever illuminated until ECM light (no accompanying warning lights) came on while drivin
issues.title: Fuel/Propulsion System
issues.blurb: 6 complaints (13%), with no crashes, fires, or injuries reported. Owners describe warning lights such as the ECM light coming on while driving.

issues.title: Air Bags
issues.blurb: 5 complaints (11%), including 1 crash. Owners report airbag warning errors showing on the dash.
